title: The Advantage
author: Patrick Lencioni
subline: Organizational health is the ultimate competitive edge.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A pyramid: top = Smart + Healthy (RED, the only 2 elements at the top), middle = 4 disciplines of health, base = the rest. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1180)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- Smart (achromatic) -->
    <g transform="translate(-280 -100)">
      <rect x="-140" y="-60" width="280" height="120" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
      <text x="0" y="-12" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.06em">SMART</text>
      <text x="0" y="18" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">STRATEGY · FINANCE · TECH</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Healthy (RED) -->
    <g transform="translate(280 -100)">
      <rect x="-140" y="-60" width="280" height="120" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <text x="0" y="-12" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.06em">HEALTHY</text>
      <text x="0" y="18" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="400" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.85" letter-spacing="0.18em">MINIMAL POLITICS</text>
    </g>
    <!-- 4 disciplines row -->
    <g transform="translate(0 100)" font-size="15" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.04em" text-anchor="middle">
      <g transform="translate(-450 0)">
        <rect x="-110" y="-30" width="220" height="60" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="0" y="6">Build a Cohesive</text>
        <text x="0" y="26">Leadership Team</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-150 0)">
        <rect x="-110" y="-30" width="220" height="60" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="0" y="6">Create</text>
        <text x="0" y="26">Clarity</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(150 0)">
        <rect x="-110" y="-30" width="220" height="60" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="0" y="6">Overcommunicate</text>
        <text x="0" y="26">Clarity</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(450 0)">
        <rect x="-110" y="-30" width="220" height="60" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="0" y="6">Reinforce</text>
        <text x="0" y="26">Clarity</text>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- Hairline that frames the model: top 2 boxes separated from 4 boxes by a single red rule -->
    <line x1="-560" y1="20" x2="560" y2="20" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/>
    <!-- Two arrow tips pointing from 4 disciplines up to HEALTHY (the goal) -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none" opacity="0.7">
      <path d="M -150 70 Q 0 50 280 60"/>
      <path d="M 150 70 Q 0 50 280 60"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Two side-by-side boxes at the top: SMART (ash) and HEALTHY (RED, the only chromatic accent). The book argues HEALTHY is the missing advantage. Below, the 4 disciplines sit in a row of muted boxes, connected by hairlines to the red HEALTHY block above. The 340px title sits below in the bottom half.
